_comment_layer2Scope: Scope of Layer 2 content keyword replacement: 'all' (default, rewrites the entire request body), 'system' (only the system prompt; leaves user/assistant/tool_result content as original so the agent reads untranslated text), or 'off' (no Layer 2 content replacement). Layers 3 (tool-name fingerprint) and 4 (system template strip) carry the anti-detection signal and are unaffected. RISK: validated only on Haiku + single-shot + short context; the tool-array fingerprint path is untested. Flip on real traffic to verify — Extra Usage is disabled, so a third-party verdict errors immediately rather than billing silently.
_comment_layers: All v2 layers enabled by default. Set to false to disable individual layers.
_comment_config: The replacements, reverseMap, toolRenames, and propRenames arrays below show the defaults. You only need config.json if you want to customize them.
_comment_toolRenames: Tool name renames are applied as quoted replacements throughout the entire body. The defaults cover all known OpenClaw tools. Add entries for any custom tools your OpenClaw version adds.
_comment_propRenames: Property renames handle OC-specific schema properties. Add entries for any custom properties.
